name: Shield Wall
description: +2 Defense when adjacent to an ally.

name: Counter-Attack
description: On a miss by 5+, attacker takes 1d4 damage.

name: Quick Hands
description: Swap weapons without spending an action.

name: Steady Aim
description: +2 Ranged when you did not move this turn.

name: Tracker
description: Encounter chance halved when you lead travel.

name: Fortify
description: +3 Defense on your turn if you do not move.

name: Rallying Cry
description: Once per battle: allies within 2 tiles gain +2 Resolve until end of round.
